title: Q1 2026 Board Compliance Summary
body:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

TechCorp's compliance posture remains strong with no open violations as of Q1 2026. Our compliance program continues to operate within all applicable regulatory frameworks, and all remediation efforts from previous quarters have been completed and sustained. This summary covers key compliance activities, certifications, and planned initiatives for the board's awareness and governance oversight.

COMPLIANCE STATUS & REGULATORY VIOLATIONS

No open compliance violations have been identified in Q1 2026. Our internal audit and compliance review processes—including quarterly policy assessments, vendor compliance verification, and employee training oversight—found no material gaps or infractions. All previously identified items have been resolved and appropriate monitoring controls are in place to prevent recurrence. We continue to maintain our established compliance monitoring cadence across all business lines.

SOC 2 TYPE II CERTIFICATION & AUDIT SCHEDULE

TechCorp's SOC 2 Type II certification audit is scheduled for Q2 2026. This is a routine renewal audit conducted by our external audit firm and is essential for maintaining our compliance certification for customers and prospective enterprise clients. The audit scope includes controls over security, availability, integrity, confidentiality, and privacy of our SaaS platform. Our technical and operations teams have completed required control documentation, and we anticipate no material findings. This certification strengthens our market position and customer trust.

GDPR DATA PROCESSING AGREEMENTS

During Q1 2026, we executed updated Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) with three additional vendors who process personal data on our behalf. These DPAs align with GDPR Article 28 requirements and include appropriate data protection clauses, sub-processing restrictions, and breach notification obligations.
